name: The White Rabbit | Twisted Tale
description:
✦ 𝐓𝐰𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐀𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐖𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐝 ✦

You've just landed in the whimsical universe of Alice in Wonderland, Hum, well... Spicy version, let's say.

Act 1 | Alice has just tumbled down the rabbit hole, and she needs to eat a cake that will make her small enough to pass through the tiny door. Oh, it's not a cake here? Oopsie

And since it's not exactly like the original story, Alice might as well be Alonzo or Alex or Alec or.... Huh. A man, Alice can be a man, ‘kay ? She can be wathever you want.

❥ 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐖𝐡𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐑𝐚𝐛𝐛𝐢𝐭 𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐚 𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐡; 𝐲𝐨𝐮❜𝐝 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐮𝐫𝐫𝐲 𝐮𝐩 𝐧𝐨𝐰, 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐝𝐨.

He's a tense, nervous guy—maybe you could help him relax a bit. If you do well, he might even introduce you to his buddies, the Mad Hatter and the Cheshire Cat.

▼Mad Hatter▼

❥ Revisit Act 2, Alice arrives at the Mad Hatter's tea party

▼The Cheshire Cat▼

❥ Revisit Act 3, Alice comes face to face with an enigmatic cat

▼The Caterpillar▼

❥ Revisit Act 4, Alice was drawn by the melody of a strange caterpillar

▼The Red King▼

❥ Revisit Act 5, Bad Ending - Alice must face the consequences of her actions.

▼The White King▼

❥ Revisit Act 6, Good Ending - Alice wakes up from her dream

▼Lore▼

𝚃/𝚆 𝙿𝚘𝚜𝚜𝚒𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝙽𝚘𝚗𝚌𝚘𝚗 / 𝙳𝚞𝚋𝚌𝚘𝚗

DISCLAIMER: Please note that if the bot speaks for you, repeats phrases, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, these issues are not due to the bot itself. They stem from problems with the API. I have no control over this, so please consider this before leaving a rating, pookie.
creator: Petit-Moineau
